headline: Nasdaq leads US stocks in monthly gains following April rally
summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are on track to post massive monthly gains to close out April, with the Nasdaq Composite rising nearly 20% in that period. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the market's monthly performance and the latest moves in the tech sector.

headline: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading lower following reports that OpenAI has missed some internal targets for sales and usership, which may erode confidence in future demand. Also, ongoing Middle East tensions are weighing on broader sentiment.

headline: 5 Overbought Tech Stocks to Sell for Profit
summary: Profit-taking opportunity in lesser-known high-flying tech stocks like MXL, TXN, ATOM, CUB, and AME, which are showing overextended rallies and technical signals for possible pullbacks.

headline: Is Lattice’s TI-Powered Real-Time Sensor Fusion Push Altering The Investment Case For Lattice Semiconductor (LSCC)?
summary: In April 2026, Texas Instruments announced a collaboration with Lattice Semiconductor to pair TI sensing technologies with Lattice’s low-power FPGA-based Holoscan Sensor Bridge, enabling synchronized, low latency sensor data pipelines for advanced robotics and industrial edge AI systems. This partnership, alongside Lattice’s expanding Holoscan ecosystem and emphasis on physical AI applications, may enhance its relevance in edge robotics and industrial automation design cycles.
